name: st
description: STMicroelectronics is a global semiconductor leader delivering intelligent and energy-efficient solutions for a smarter, more sustainable world. ST offers a comprehensive portfolio of products including microcontrollers, power discretes, analog ICs, and sensors serving automotive, industrial, personal electronics, and communications markets.
longDescription: STMicroelectronics (ST) is one of the world's largest semiconductor companies, formed in 1987 through the merger of semiconductor businesses from SGS Microelettronica of Italy and Thomson Semiconducteurs of France. Headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland, ST has emerged as a global leader in developing intelligent and energy-efficient semiconductor solutions. The company serves customers across the spectrum of sense and power technologies and embedded processing solutions. ST's product portfolio spans microcontrollers, power discretes, analog ICs, sensors, and connectivity solutions. With a strong commitment to sustainability and innovation, ST is at the forefront of enabling the digital transformation across automotive electrification, industrial automation, IoT applications, and smart devices. The company operates a global network of front-end and back-end manufacturing facilities, ensuring supply security and quality excellence.

coreProducts.name: Microcontrollers
coreProducts.description: Industry-leading STM32 and STM8 microcontroller families offering scalable performance, ultra-low power consumption, and extensive ecosystem support for embedded applications.

coreProducts.name: Power Discretes
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency power MOSFETs, IGBTs, and wide bandgap devices (SiC and GaN) for automotive, industrial, and renewable energy applications with industry-leading performance.

coreProducts.name: Analog ICs
coreProducts.description: Comprehensive analog portfolio including operational amplifiers, comparators, voltage references, and power management ICs for precision signal processing and power conversion.

coreProducts.name: Sensors
coreProducts.description: Advanced MEMS and imaging sensors including accelerometers, gyroscopes, pressure sensors, and environmental sensors for IoT, automotive, and consumer applications.

industries.name: Automotive
industries.description: Semiconductor solutions for electric vehicles, ADAS, powertrain, and body electronics with AEC-Q100 qualified products and ISO 26262 functional safety support.

industries.name: Industrial
industries.description: Robust solutions for factory automation, motor control, power conversion, and industrial IoT with extended temperature ranges and high reliability.

industries.name: Personal Electronics
industries.description: Ultra-low-power solutions for smartphones, wearables, and portable devices enabling longer battery life and richer user experiences.

industries.name: Communications
industries.description: High-performance solutions for 5G infrastructure, data centers, and IoT connectivity with advanced RF and power management technologies.

seoTitle: STMicroelectronics Distributor | ST Semiconductors & MCUs | BeiLuo Electronics

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor for STMicroelectronics?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor for STMicroelectronics. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine ST products with full factory warranty, technical support, and access to ST's comprehensive design resources including STM32 ecosystem tools, evaluation boards, and software libraries. Our partnership with ST ensures customers receive authentic products, competitive pricing, and expert technical assistance for their embedded design projects.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo sales team to verify our current ST authorization status and discuss your specific microcontroller or power discrete requirements.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of STMicroelectronics products?
faqs.answer: STMicroelectronics offers several key competitive advantages: Industry-leading STM32 microcontroller ecosystem with the broadest ARM Cortex-M portfolio; Advanced power discretes including silicon carbide (SiC) and gallium nitride (GaN) devices for high-efficiency applications; Comprehensive MEMS sensor portfolio with market-leading performance; Strong focus on automotive-grade products with ISO 26262 functional safety support; Integrated manufacturing capabilities ensuring supply security; Extensive development tools including STM32Cube ecosystem; Commitment to sustainability with energy-efficient product designs. ST's vertical integration provides advantages in quality control and supply chain management.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our ST product catalog to explore STM32 families, power discretes, and sensor solutions for your application needs.

faqs.question: How does STMicroelectronics compare to other semiconductor manufacturers?
faqs.answer: STMicroelectronics differentiates itself through several strengths: Largest ARM Cortex-M microcontroller portfolio with the most comprehensive STM32 ecosystem; Leadership in MEMS sensors with over 15 billion devices shipped; Pioneer in wide bandgap semiconductors with mature SiC and GaN offerings; Strong automotive presence with AEC-Q100 qualified products and functional safety expertise; Integrated device manufacturer (IDM) model ensuring supply security; Extensive development ecosystem including free STM32Cube software tools. Compared to competitors, ST offers superior ecosystem support for embedded designs and leads in power efficiency innovations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Compare ST products with alternatives using our parametric search tools or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What support does BeiLuo provide for STMicroelectronics products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive support for STMicroelectronics products including: Application engineering support from experienced FAEs with STM32 and power discrete expertise; Technical consultation for microcontroller selection and embedded system design; Access to ST development tools, reference designs, and evaluation boards; Programming and testing services for production; Supply chain management and inventory planning; Competitive pricing and volume discounts; Fast delivery from local stock. Our technical team can assist with firmware development, PCB layout guidance, and power system design for ST-based solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss your project requirements and receive personalized ST product recommendations.

faqs.question: What are ST's main product families and their applications?
faqs.answer: STMicroelectronics organizes its products into key categories: Microcontrollers - STM32 (ARM Cortex-M0/M0+/M3/M4/M7/M33) and STM8 families for embedded control; Power Discretes - MOSFETs, IGBTs, SiC MOSFETs, and GaN devices for power conversion; Analog ICs - Operational amplifiers, comparators, voltage references, and power management; Sensors - MEMS accelerometers, gyroscopes, pressure sensors, and environmental sensors; Connectivity - Bluetooth, LoRa, NFC, and secure MCU solutions. These products serve applications from IoT devices to electric vehicles and industrial automation systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our product selector tool or browse by application category to find the right ST products for your embedded design.

faqs.question: How can I ensure I'm getting authentic ST products?
faqs.answer: To ensure authentic STMicroelectronics products, purchase only from authorized distributors like BeiLuo Electronics. Authorized distributors provide: Genuine ST products with full factory warranty; Proper handling and storage according to ST specifications; Complete traceability and documentation; Access to ST's technical support resources; Notification of product changes and obsolescence. ST products include anti-counterfeiting measures and traceability markings. Avoid purchasing from unauthorized sources where counterfeit or improperly handled products may be present. BeiLuo provides certificates of authenticity and full documentation with every order.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always purchase ST products from authorized distributors. Contact BeiLuo sales to verify our authorization status.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for STMicroelectronics products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for STMicroelectronics products vary based on product type and market conditions: Standard STM32 microcontrollers from stock typically ship within 1-3 days; Popular power discretes and analog ICs usually available from local inventory; Products requiring factory order typically have 8-16 week lead times depending on complexity; Automotive-grade products may have longer qualification cycles. BeiLuo maintains local inventory of popular ST products including STM32F4, STM32H7 series and power MOSFETs to support quick-turn requirements. For critical projects, we offer demand forecasting and buffer stock programs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo sales for current lead times and to discuss inventory planning for your production requirements.

faqs.question: Does STMicroelectronics offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, STMicroelectronics offers extensive automotive-grade products qualified to AEC-Q100 standards with ISO 26262 functional safety support. ST's automotive portfolio includes: STM32A series microcontrollers for body electronics and powertrain; SPC5 automotive MCUs for powertrain and safety applications; Power MOSFETs and IGBTs for EV/HEV traction inverters; Battery management solutions for electric vehicles; MEMS sensors for automotive safety systems; Gate drivers and protection devices. These products undergo rigorous qualification testing including extended temperature range (-40°C to +125°C or +150°C) and enhanced reliability testing. ST is a leading supplier to major automotive Tier 1s and OEMs worldwide.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our automotive product category or contact our automotive FAE for specific AEC-Q100 qualified solutions.
